job.name: INFORCE_DQ_DASHBOARD
job.description: Inforce Membership Monthly Movement – Data Quality Dashboard

validations.name: net_gain_balance
validations.description: Validates that inforce member counts match movement calculations for all states and products
validations.logic: Compares net gain from inforce counts vs ADD/DEDUCT movements for Classic, Plus, and Premier products
validations.failure_implication: Indicates data inconsistency between inforce and movement tracking

validations.name: interstate_transfer_balance
validations.description: Ensures interstate transfers are properly balanced between ADD and DEDUCT operations
validations.logic: Compares count of ADD interstate transfers vs DEDUCT interstate transfers
validations.failure_implication: Indicates missing or incomplete interstate transfer records

validations.name: movement_anomaly_detection
validations.description: Detects unusual patterns in movement subcategories using statistical analysis
validations.logic: Compares current counts against 12-month moving average for specific subcategories
validations.expected_result: Most records should be 'NORMAL' with occasional 'ANOMALY' flags
validations.failure_implication: Indicates potential data quality issues or business process changes

validations.name: movement_summary
validations.description: Provides summary counts of movement categories and subcategories
validations.logic: Aggregates counts by movement_category and movement_subcategory for Classic product
validations.expected_result: Reference data for understanding movement patterns

validations.name: movement_decay_rolling_avg
validations.description: Calculate 10-month rolling average of count(*) grouped by movement_category and flag rows deviating by more than 10%
validations.logic: Aggregates counts by movement_category by decay for Classic product
validations.expected_result: Reference data for understanding movement patterns

validations.name: movement_add_deducts_rolling_avg
validations.description: Calculate 10-month rolling average of count(*) grouped by movement_category and flag rows deviating by more than 10%
validations.logic: Aggregates counts by movement_category Adds/Deducts for Classic product
validations.expected_result: Reference data for understanding movement patterns

validations.name: movement_subcategory_completeness
validations.description: Validate completeness: for a given load_date and movement_category, check if all expected movement_subcategories are present
validations.expected_result: Reference data for understanding movement patterns

validations.name: nne_counts_check
validations.description: Validate NNE (Non-New-Enrollment) counts are within expected range
validations.logic: Checks NNE count patterns across load dates
validations.failure_implication: NNE data may be missing or duplicated

validations.name: statewise_add_check
validations.description: Standard deviation check on ADD movements by state
validations.logic: Computes std dev for state-level ADD counts and flags outliers
validations.expected_result: All states within expected deviation range
validations.failure_implication: Indicates unusual ADD activity in specific states

validations.name: statewise_add_movement_sub
validations.display_name: Statewise ADD with Movement Sub-Categories Check
validations.description: Standard deviation check on ADD movements by state with sub-category breakdown
validations.logic: Computes std dev at state + movement_subcategory level for ADD
validations.failure_implication: Indicates unusual ADD sub-category activity in specific states

validations.name: statewise_deduct_movement_sub
validations.display_name: Statewise Deduct with Movement Sub-Categories Check
validations.description: Standard deviation check on DEDUCT movements by state with sub-category breakdown
validations.logic: Computes std dev at state + movement_subcategory level for DEDUCT
validations.failure_implication: Indicates unusual DEDUCT sub-category activity in specific states

validations.name: inactive_reason_check
validations.description: Validates inactive reason codes are properly populated
validations.logic: Checks that all inactive members have valid reason codes
validations.expected_result: All inactive records should have reason codes

validations.name: add_new_seasonality
validations.description: Seasonality and standard deviation analysis for ADD-NEW movement category
validations.logic: Computes decay-based std dev for new member additions
validations.failure_implication: Unusual new member addition patterns detected

validations.name: add_arrears_seasonality
validations.description: Seasonality and standard deviation analysis for ADD-ARREARS movement category
validations.logic: Computes decay-based std dev for arrears additions

validations.name: deduct_cancel_seasonality
validations.description: Seasonality and standard deviation analysis for DEDUCT-CANCEL movement category
validations.logic: Computes decay-based std dev for cancellation deductions

validations.name: deduct_arrears_seasonality
validations.description: Seasonality and standard deviation analysis for DEDUCT-ARREARS movement category
validations.logic: Computes decay-based std dev for arrears deductions

validations.name: statewise_decay_add_sub1
validations.display_name: Statewise ADD - NEW with Movement Sub-Categories Check
validations.description: State-level decay analysis for ADD-NEW movement sub-category
validations.logic: Computes decay std dev at state level for new additions
validations.failure_implication: Unusual ADD-NEW patterns in specific states

validations.name: statewise_decay_add_sub2
validations.display_name: Statewise ADD - ARREARS with Movement Sub-Categories Check
validations.description: State-level decay analysis for ADD-ARREARS movement sub-category
validations.logic: Computes decay std dev at state level for arrears additions
validations.failure_implication: Unusual ADD-ARREARS patterns in specific states

trends._comment: Queries for membership count trend tracking. Results are charted as trend lines.

queries.name: monthly_inforce_trend
queries.query: SELECT load_date, product_type, COUNT(*) AS member_count FROM monthly_movement_hist WHERE movement_category = 'INFORCE' GROUP BY load_date, product_type ORDER BY load_date

queries.name: monthly_add_vs_deduct_trend
queries.query: SELECT load_date, movement_category, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM monthly_movement_hist WHERE movement_category IN ('ADD', 'DEDUCT') GROUP BY load_date, movement_category ORDER BY load_date

queries.name: net_gain_trend
queries.query: SELECT load_date, SUM(CASE WHEN movement_category='ADD' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) - SUM(CASE WHEN movement_category='DEDUCT' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS net_gain FROM monthly_movement_hist GROUP BY load_date ORDER BY load_date

queries.name: statewise_inforce_trend
queries.query: SELECT club_code, load_date, COUNT(*) AS member_count FROM monthly_movement_hist WHERE movement_category='INFORCE' GROUP BY club_code, load_date ORDER BY load_date, member_count DESC

kpis._comment: KPI queries that produce single-value metrics for the scorecard section.

queries.name: total_inforce_current
queries.query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS value FROM monthly_movement_hist WHERE movement_category='INFORCE' AND load_date = (SELECT MAX(load_date) FROM monthly_movement_hist WHERE movement_category='INFORCE')

queries.name: total_adds_current
queries.query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS value FROM monthly_movement_hist WHERE movement_category='ADD' AND load_date = (SELECT MAX(load_date) FROM monthly_movement_hist WHERE movement_category='ADD')

queries.name: total_deducts_current
queries.query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS value FROM monthly_movement_hist WHERE movement_category='DEDUCT' AND load_date = (SELECT MAX(load_date) FROM monthly_movement_hist WHERE movement_category='DEDUCT')

queries.name: net_gain_current
queries.query: SELECT (SUM(CASE WHEN movement_category='ADD' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) - SUM(CASE WHEN movement_category='DEDUCT' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)) AS value FROM monthly_movement_hist WHERE load_date = (SELECT MAX(load_date) FROM monthly_movement_hist)

queries.name: classic_inforce
queries.query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS value FROM monthly_movement_hist WHERE movement_category='INFORCE' AND product_type='CLASSIC' AND load_date = (SELECT MAX(load_date) FROM monthly_movement_hist WHERE movement_category='INFORCE')

queries.name: plus_inforce
queries.query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS value FROM monthly_movement_hist WHERE movement_category='INFORCE' AND product_type='PLUS' AND load_date = (SELECT MAX(load_date) FROM monthly_movement_hist WHERE movement_category='INFORCE')

queries.name: premier_inforce
queries.query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS value FROM monthly_movement_hist WHERE movement_category='INFORCE' AND product_type='PREMIER' AND load_date = (SELECT MAX(load_date) FROM monthly_movement_hist WHERE movement_category='INFORCE')

queries.name: retention_rate
queries.query: SELECT ROUND(100.0 * (1.0 - (CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN movement_category='DEDUCT' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS DOUBLE) / NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN movement_category='INFORCE' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0))), 2) AS value FROM monthly_movement_hist WHERE load_date = (SELECT MAX(load_date) FROM monthly_movement_hist)
